name: Frozen Peppermint Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients and press firmly onto the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Chill until set.
3. Beat the cream cheese at high speed with an electric mixer until fluffy.
4. Add the condensed milk, crushed peppermint candy, and liquid red food coloring. Mix well.
5. Fold in the whipped cream.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and cover.
7. Freeze until firm.
8. Garnish with whipped cream, crushed, and whole peppermint candy if desired.
